knowledge.html:
XVI. PREPOSITIONS (GIOI TU)

1. Mot so gioi tu co ban

Gioi tuCach dungVi du
inthangin May; in March
namin 2004; in 2018
muain summer; in winter
buoi trong ngayin the morning; in the afternoon; in the evening
khoang thoi gianin a minute; in three days
atbuoi trong ngayat night; at noon
thoi gian trong ngayat 7 o'clock; at midnight
dip leat Christmas; at Easter
cum tu co dinhat the same time
ondip le dac bieton Good Friday; on Easter Sunday; on my birthday
buoi cua 1 ngay dac bieton the morning of March the 1st
after(sau khi) muon hon cai gi doafter breakfast
ago(cach day bao lau) dieu gi da xay ra lau roi2 years ago
before(truoc khi) som hon cai gi dobefore Christmas
between(O giua) thoi gian chia lambetween Monday and Thursday
bykhong muon hon mot moc thoi gian nao doby Sunday
during(trong suot) trong khoang thoi gian nao doduring the holidays
forkhoang thoi gianfor three weeks
from...to / till / untiltu...den...from Monday to Wednesday; Monday till Wednesday
pastgio hon23 minutes past 6 (6:23)
sincemoc thoi giansince Monday
till/until(cho toi khi) khong muon hon mot moc co dinhtill tomorrow; until tomorrow
togio kem23 minutes to 6 (5:37)
up tokhong nhieu hon mot khoang thoi gianup to 6 hours a day
within(trong vong) trong khoang thoi gianwithin a day

2. Nhung gioi tu di kem voi cac danh tu, tinh tu va dong tu

Dong tu va gioi tu thuong di kem voi nhau

CumNghia
to be fond ofthich cai gi
to be made ofduoc lam bang (chat lieu nao do)
to differ fromkhac biet ve dieu gi
to look atnhin vao
to look aftercham soc (ai)
to listen tolang nghe (ai)
to take aftertrong giong voi
to talk tonoi chuyen voi (ai)
to travel todi den (mot noi nao do)
to point atchi vao (ai)
to take part intham gia vao
to participate intham gia
to get on a train/bus/planelen tau hoa/xe bus/may bay
to fill withlam day, lap day
to belong tothuoc ve
to think aboutnghi ve
to give uptu bo
to keep onvan, cu, tiep tuc

Dong tu luon di voi gioi tu "from"

CumNghia
to borrow from sb/stvay muon cua ai/cai gi
to escape fromthoat ra tu cai gi
to suffer fromchiu dung dau kho
to be away from st/sbxa cach cai gi/ai
to be different from stkhac ve cai gi
to be far from sb/stxa cach ai/cai gi
to be safe from stan toan trong cai gi

Dong tu luon di kem voi gioi tu "in"

CumNghia
to believe in st/sbtin tuong cai gi/vao ai
to help sb in stgiup ai viec gi
to be interested in st/doing stquan tam cai gi/viec gi

Nhung tu di kem voi gioi tu "with"

CumNghia
to be angry with sbgian do ai
to be busy with stban voi cai gi
to be familiar (to/with)quen voi cai gi
to be popular withpho bien quen thuoc

Nhung tu di kem voi gioi tu "to be"

CumNghia
to be close to stsat gan vao cai gi
to be contrary to sb/stnguoc voi cai gi/voi ai
to be dear to sbquy gia doi voi ai
to be harmful to stco hai cho cai gi
to be new to sbmoi voi ai
to be rude to sbtho lo voi ai
to be useful to stco loi cho cai gi

Nhung tu di theo gioi tu "at"

to be bad at st, to be good/clever at st

Nhung tu di theo gioi tu "for"

CumNghia
to be eager for sthao huc voi cai gi
to be famous for stnoi tieng vi cai gi
to be ready for stsan sang lam viec gi
to be responsible for stchiu trach nhiem ve cai gi
to be sorry for sbxin loi ai
to be thankful for sbcam on ai
to be sorry for V-ing/sthoi tiec vi da lam gi

Nhung tu di kem voi gioi tu "about"

to be sorry about st (lay lam tiec, hoi tiec ve cai gi), to be curious about st (to mo ve cai gi)

Nhung tu di kem voi gioi tu "on"

to be dependent on st/sb (le thuoc vao cai gi/vao ai), to be intent on st (tap trung tu tuong vao cai), to be keen on st (ghi me cai gi)

exercises.question: Three students were accused _____ cheating in the examination.
exercises.explanation: 'be accused of' = bi buoc toi ve viec gi.

exercises.question: I wrote to the company to ask them _____ more information about the job.
exercises.explanation: 'ask someone for something' = yeu cau ai cai gi.

exercises.question: I'm not going out yet. I'm waiting _____ the rain to stop.
Sorry I haven't written _____ you for such a long time.
exercises.explanation: 'write to someone' = viet thu cho ai.

exercises.question: Who was that man I saw you talking _____ in the pub?
exercises.explanation: 'talk to someone' = noi chuyen voi ai.

exercises.question: They were playing football _____ 4 p.m. to 6 p.m. yesterday.
Sometimes Mr. Pike has to work very late _____ night to do some important experiments.
I haven't gone there _____ ages.
exercises.explanation: 'for ages' = da lau lam roi (khoang thoi gian).

exercises.question: Leaves turn color _____ the autumn.
exercises.explanation: 'in the autumn' = vao mua thu (dung 'in' voi mua).

exercises.question: Ann is going away for a week _____ September.
Tell me _____ Friday whether or not you can come to the party.
exercises.explanation: 'by Friday' = khong muon hon thu Sau (han chot).

exercises.question: I was tired this morning, so I stayed in bed _____ half past ten.
exercises.explanation: 'until/till' = cho den khi. O tren giuong cho den 10h30.

exercises.question: The bus was late this morning, which is unusual. It's usually _____ time.
exercises.explanation: 'on time' = dung gio (thanh ngu co dinh).

exercises.question: I think I'd like to work _____ a farm.
exercises.explanation: 'on a farm' = tren nong trai (dung 'on' voi farm).

exercises.question: I think we can meet _____ the bus stop.
exercises.explanation: 'at the bus stop' = tai tram xe bus (diem cu the).

exercises.question: English is spoken all _____ the world.
exercises.explanation: 'all over the world' = khap the gioi.

exercises.question: The train has to go _____ three tunnels.
